evidence: We use AI and other emerging technologies in various facets of our operations and our business.
failure to effectively and timely utilize, emerging technologies, including artificial intelligence
We use AI and other emerging technologies in various facets of our operations and our business.
unable to timely utilize AI for technological innovation and business operation efficiency in a manner that is faster and more effective than our competitors
compliance with new or changing laws, regulations or industry standards relating to AI may impose significant costs on us and limit our ability to effectively develop, deploy or use AI technologies

limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No named AI programs, dollar amounts, headcount, or specific AI products disclosed in excerpts; only generic statements about using AI across operations.
ai_narrative_concreteness: No specific named AI initiatives, deployment status, or quantified results disclosed; language is aspirational and risk-framing rather than operational detail.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present and discusses multiple named AI risk categories with mechanisms (regulatory cost, IP/confidentiality exposure, competitive disadvantage, cybersecurity), warranting score 4; no quantification or named governance bodies found to reach score 5.
